content:
2025 December & January contribution list is here!
We sincerely thank the below <@&1301589804135223316>   for their help!
Additionally, we would like to specifically thank <@183782216353054720>  for helping us compile the contributors list this time!
EN:
● arkaether (Lens) — Main Story Proofreading (Prologue)
● omnichromia (Mercy) — Proofreading & Organization (Misc. Text, Exalt Voicelines)
● omnichromia (Mercy) — Proofreading (Faded Legacy Ch.1, Items, Investigation Begin Dialogs, Covenant Transcription)
● Dredge — Text Message Proofreading (Castor, Celeste, Clementine)
KR:
● nero_aliapoh (Nero) — Translation & Proofreading (Relic names, Option texts, StageData, Faded Legacy Ch. 1~3)
● wisteriavine11 (LavenderJuly) — Translation (Text Messages: Aigis, Hameln)
● BlackCatNero (Nero) — Translation (Relic texts, Task, Summon)
JP:
● alz_asn (Alza) — Translation & Proofreading (Dreamscape, Text Messages, Faded Legacy Ch. 7, Special Ops, Video captions, UI, and Items)
ID:
● omnichromia (Mercy) — Proofreading & Organization (Wheels of Destiny)
● Adelle — Translation (Wheels of Destiny)
● Rosemary — Translation (Wheels of Destiny)
ES:
● Miguel Angel — Translation (Arcane Dominion, Assignments)
● Teje — Translation (Arcane Dominion, Assignments)
TH:
● darkerkuro — Translation  (Arcane Dominion, Assignments, Dissolution Ruins, Lightless Realm, Verboten Covenant)
● Attchan — Translation (Assignments)
